overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle travels through commercial streets, tunnels, elevated highways, and narrow building canyons with heavy rain and futuristic neon signage throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and palm trees

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked commercial district with neon storefronts and billboards

entered.detail: illuminated white neon sign reading 'deli' on building facade
large digital billboard displaying 'COLA' advertisement with red and white colors
neon sign for 'Brooklyn Barista' with orange and red lettering
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked commercial street at night, surrounded by bright neon signs including 'deli', 'COLA', and 'Brooklyn Barista'. Palm trees line the left side while the wet asphalt reflects the colorful neon lights. The rain creates streaks across the windshield as the vehicle moves forward through the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban road approaching tunnel entrance

events.description: entering covered roadway beneath concrete overpass structure
transitioning from neon-lit street to darker tunnel interior with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching and entering the tunnel underpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating covered roadway
dark tunnel opening with artificial lighting inside
red illuminated sign reading 'FULL' near tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered roadway beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from the open neon-lit street to a darker, enclosed space. The environment becomes more industrial with concrete walls replacing glass storefronts. The tunnel entrance looms ahead with a red 'FULL' sign visible as the lighting shifts to artificial sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: service tunnel transitioning to elevated highway

events.description: exiting tunnel into open elevated highway with city views
artificial tunnel lighting transitions to ambient night light and distant neon

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the tunnel and emerging onto the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with brake lights illuminated, traveling in same direction

entered.detail: rough concrete tunnel walls with vertical support beams
metal guardrails along the edge of the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: Driving through the enclosed concrete tunnel with artificial lighting, then emerging onto an elevated highway. The vehicle accelerates as it exits the tunnel, revealing a distant city skyline. Another vehicle is visible ahead with its brake lights on. The environment transitions from fully enclosed to open elevated roadway with guardrails.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with urban canyon views

events.description: vehicle steers right entering narrow corridor between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed on elevated highway through heavy rain

entered.detail: distant illuminated skyscrapers visible through the rain
metal safety barriers along both sides of the elevated road

segments.scene_description: Cruising at high speed along the elevated highway with expansive views of the distant city skyline through the heavy rain. The road is flanked by metal guardrails as the vehicle moves through the open air. The scene transitions as the vehicle turns right, approaching a narrow corridor between towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow skyscraper canyon and underpass with neon art installation

events.description: entering narrow building canyon with walls close on both sides
passing under large circular neon sign installation with pink and blue rings

agents.ego_description: navigating tight turns between skyscrapers and driving under neon installations

entered.detail: tall building facades with illuminated windows passing very close to vehicle
large circular neon installation with concentric pink and blue rings
concrete ceiling and support beams of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a claustrophobic narrow canyon between towering skyscrapers, with building walls passing extremely close on both sides. Looking up reveals grids of illuminated windows. The vehicle passes under a striking neon art installation featuring large circular rings of pink and blue light, then continues through a concrete underpass with the road narrowing significantly.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with digital advertising screens

events.description: entering narrow alley with wall-mounted digital billboards on both sides
slowing down approaching pedestrian standing in the alley ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop in narrow alley with digital billboards covering the walls

notable_agents.action: person standing in the middle of the narrow alley facing the vehicle

entered.detail: wall covered with multiple digital advertising screens displaying various posters
series of illuminated digital posters and advertisements on left wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a tight service alley where both walls are covered in bright digital billboards and advertising screens displaying various posters. The space is narrow and enclosed with artificial lighting from the screens. The vehicle slows down as it approaches a pedestrian standing in the middle of the alley ahead, coming to a near stop as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from open neon-lit commercial streets to an expansive highway before descending into claustrophobic urban canyons. It begins by gliding past palm trees and glowing signs for a deli and Brooklyn Barista, where colorful reflections shimmer on the wet asphalt. As the vehicle moves forward, the open street gives way to a dark, industrial concrete overpass and a tunnel, eventually emerging onto an elevated highway that reveals a distant city skyline through the heavy rain. The scene then shifts as the vehicle turns right, leaving the open air to plunge into a narrow corridor of towering skyscrapers and pink and blue neon rings. Finally, the camera enters a tight service alley flanked by digital billboards, slowing to a near stop as it approaches a pedestrian standing in the middle of the path.
